name: Fritz Kreisler
abstract: Friedrich "Fritz" Kreisler (February 2, 1875 – January 29, 1962) was an Austrian and American violinist and composer. One of the most distinguished violin virtuoso of his day, he was known for his sweet tone and expressive phrasing with marked portamento and rubato.

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: they’re playing Fritz Kreisler, swinging the shit out of Fritz Kreisler tunes
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: I used to listen to Fritz Kreisler, and I would hear the way he phrased things.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
